isi.lyrics:
Lyric Gona - Thousand Times, You(Acoustic Ver.)

Romanization

I wish you’re here
I miss you, dear
When you thought of me, how did I look inside your dreams?
I hope this song can find its way into your heart
And you’ll talk to me, “I’ve played this song thousand times of you.”

I dreamed of you
All day and night.
nuneul gameumyeon, I see you softly sing along.
I hope this song can light the way to coming home.
And you’ll talk to me, “this song always brings me back to you.”

The silver lights are glowing, and laughter dances softly on the snow.
Every street looks like a movie scene.
Pray the star shines better, before this night is through.
I just hope the night won’t be too dark for you to find your way on back to me.

아른거리는 불꽃들이

아무렇지도 않게 찾아온 오늘이

늘 숨겨내려 애를 썼어
알아보지 않길 바래서

유독 떠나지 않던 넌
지겹도록 날 잡고 놓질 않아서
그게 뭐라고 그렇게 그리웠나 봐

아문 것들이 모여 선명해져 올 때면
남아있는 것들을 긁어모아
어떻게든 살아지겠지

아픈 것들이 모여 하얗게 바래갈 때쯤
우리들은 서로를 끌어안고 다시
살아가게 하겠지
살아지겠지
